description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the blang/latex Docker image and defines a single deploy stage. Add a pages job that runs only on the master branch, executes the exact shell commands: mkdir .public; (cd uebungen; latexmk -pdf main.tex); (cd notes; latexmk -pdf main.tex); mv uebungen/main.pdf .public/uebungen.pdf; mv notes/main.pdf .public/notes.pdf; mv .public public; and then publishes the public/ directory as an artifact to GitLab Pages.
